Off Calendar Jun-05-2018 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES:
No appeareance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance or objection filed, the Court orders the case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Judge: Teri L. Jackson; Clerk: Gina Gonzales. Proceedings not reported.

Off Calendar Apr-08-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Not Reported.

No appearances.

Mandarin Interpreter Mimi S J Lain is present.

The Court Adopts the Tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT WEN SONG, WAI SUM DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is sustained with 10-day leave to amend for Plaintiff to state a cause of action. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312.

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-16-2016 Continued To Apr-08-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Per Local Rule 8.10, DEFENDANT WEN SONG AND WAI SUM'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT will be heard in Department 501 at 9:30 a.m. on April 8, 2016. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976 (302/HK)
